Class MailService

java.lang.Object
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
@Service public class MailService extends Object
Service responsible for email synchronization, retrieval and mailbox management operations.

Provides functionality for synchronizing messages from external IMAP servers, managing mailbox folders, retrieving email content and maintaining locally cached email metadata.

      private final ThreadLocal<Map<String,String>> threadLocalFolderMap
      Thread-local cache containing detected folder mappings for the currently connected mailbox.

      Thread-local IMAP store connection used during mailbox operations.

      Collection of currently active mailbox synchronizations used to prevent concurrent synchronization of the same folder.

  • Constructor Details

    • MailService

      public MailService()

  • Method Details

    • getConnectedStore

      private void getConnectedStore(String accountEmail, Long userId) throws jakarta.mail.MessagingException
      Establishes or reuses an IMAP connection for the specified email account.

      If an active connection for the requested account already exists in the current thread, it is reused. Otherwise, a new authenticated IMAP connection is created and stored in thread-local storage.

      Parameters:
      accountEmail - email account address
      userId - owner of the email account
      Throws:
      jakarta.mail.MessagingException - if the IMAP connection cannot be established
      SecurityException - if the email account configuration cannot be found

    • syncFolderFromImap

      public boolean syncFolderFromImap(Long userId, String accountEmail, String folderName)
      Synchronizes a mailbox folder with the remote IMAP server.

      The method downloads message metadata, updates message status flags such as read and starred state, and stores new messages in the local database. Duplicate synchronization requests for the same mailbox folder are automatically ignored.

      Parameters:
      userId - identifier of the authenticated user
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder to synchronize
      Returns:
      true if synchronization completed successfully, otherwise false

    • syncNonGmailStarred

      private void syncNonGmailStarred(jakarta.mail.Store store, String accountEmail) throws Exception
      Synchronizes starred messages for non-Gmail accounts.

      Since many mail providers do not expose a dedicated starred folder, flagged messages are retrieved from the inbox and synchronized with locally stored message records.

      Parameters:
      store - active IMAP store connection
      accountEmail - synchronized email account
      Throws:
      Exception - if synchronization fails

    • detectFolders

      private Map<String,String> detectFolders(jakarta.mail.Store store)
      Detects standard mailbox folders available on the remote mail server.

      The method attempts to identify commonly used folders such as Inbox, Sent, Trash, Spam, Drafts and Starred using both IMAP folder attributes and localized folder names.

      Parameters:
      store - active IMAP store connection
      Returns:
      mapping between logical folder names and actual server folder names

    • getRealFolderName

      private String getRealFolderName(jakarta.mail.Store store, String folderName)
      Resolves a logical folder name to the actual folder name used by the remote mail server.

      Folder mappings are detected once per thread and cached for subsequent mailbox operations.

      Parameters:
      store - active IMAP store connection
      folderName - logical folder name
      Returns:
      actual folder name on the mail server

    • extractSnippet

      private String extractSnippet(jakarta.mail.Message message)
      Extracts a short preview snippet from an email message.

      The method supports plain text, HTML and multipart messages and returns a shortened representation suitable for mailbox listings.

      Parameters:
      message - source email message
      Returns:
      message preview snippet

    • cleanHTML

      private String cleanHTML(String html)
      Removes HTML tags and returns plain text content.
      Parameters:
      html - HTML content
      Returns:
      cleaned plain text

    • closeQuietly

      private void closeQuietly(AutoCloseable resource)
      Safely closes a resource without propagating exceptions.
      Parameters:
      resource - resource to close

    • moveEmailToFolder

      public boolean moveEmailToFolder(Long userId, String accountEmail, String sourceFolderName, String targetFolderName, long uid, String sender, String subject, Date sentDate)
      Moves an email message between folders or updates its starred status.

      For standard folder operations, the message is copied to the target folder and removed from the source folder. For starred operations, the IMAP flagged status is updated without physically moving the message.

      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      accountEmail - email account address
      sourceFolderName - source folder
      targetFolderName - destination folder
      uid - message UID
      sender - sender email address
      subject - message subject
      sentDate - message sent date
      Returns:
      true if the operation succeeds, otherwise false

    • getEmailMessage

      public EmailMessage getEmailMessage(Long userId, String accountEmail, String folderName, long uid)
      Retrieves full details of an email message from the IMAP server.

      The method marks the message as read on both the server and the local database and returns message content together with attachment metadata.

      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder
      uid - IMAP message UID
      Returns:
      populated email message model or null if not found

    • getFullContent

      private String getFullContent(jakarta.mail.Part part) throws Exception
      Extracts the complete content of an email message.

      HTML content is preferred when available. Multipart messages are traversed recursively to locate the most appropriate message body.

      Parameters:
      part - MIME part to process
      Returns:
      extracted message content
      Throws:
      Exception - if content extraction fails

    • downloadAttachment

      public byte[] downloadAttachment(Long userId, String accountEmail, String folderName, long uid, String fileName)
      Downloads an attachment from an email message.
      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder
      uid - message UID
      fileName - attachment filename
      Returns:
      attachment data as a byte array or null if not found

    • findPartDataRecursive

      private byte[] findPartDataRecursive(jakarta.mail.Part part, String fileName) throws Exception
      Recursively searches a MIME structure for an attachment or embedded resource and returns its binary data.
      Parameters:
      part - MIME part to inspect
      fileName - target filename or content identifier
      Returns:
      attachment data or null if not found
      Throws:
      Exception - if MIME processing fails

    • getAttachmentsInfo

      private List<Attachment> getAttachmentsInfo(jakarta.mail.Message message) throws Exception
      Collects metadata for all non-inline attachments contained in a message.
      Parameters:
      message - email message
      Returns:
      list of attachment descriptors
      Throws:
      Exception - if attachment processing fails

    • extractAttachmentsRecursive

      private void extractAttachmentsRecursive(jakarta.mail.Part part, List<Attachment> list) throws Exception
      Recursively traverses a MIME structure and extracts attachment metadata.
      Parameters:
      part - MIME part to inspect
      list - destination attachment collection
      Throws:
      Exception - if attachment extraction fails

    • prepareBaseEmailFromImap

      public org.simplejavamail.api.email.Email prepareBaseEmailFromImap(Long userId, String accountEmail, String folderName, long uid)
      Loads an email message from the IMAP server and converts it into a reusable email representation.

      This method is primarily used for reply and forward operations, preserving embedded images and attachment references.

      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder
      uid - message UID
      Returns:
      prepared email object or null if conversion fails

    • getSuggestedRecipients

      public List<String> getSuggestedRecipients(Long userId, String senderEmail)
      Retrieves recently used recipients for a specific sender account.
      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      senderEmail - sender email address
      Returns:
      list of suggested recipient addresses

    • getGlobalSuggestedRecipients

      public List<String> getGlobalSuggestedRecipients(Long userId)
      Retrieves recently used recipients across all user email accounts.
      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      Returns:
      list of suggested recipient addresses

    • addSuggestedRecipient

      public Mail addSuggestedRecipient(Long userId, String senderEmail, String recipientEmail)
      Adds or updates a recipient suggestion entry.

      If the recipient already exists, its last usage timestamp is refreshed instead of creating a duplicate record.

      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      senderEmail - sender email address
      recipientEmail - recipient email address
      Returns:
      persisted suggestion entity

    • deleteSuggestedRecipient

      public void deleteSuggestedRecipient(Long userId, String senderEmail, String recipientEmail)
      Removes a saved recipient suggestion.
      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      senderEmail - sender email address
      recipientEmail - recipient email address

    • getUserEmailAccounts

      public List<String> getUserEmailAccounts(Long userId)
      Retrieves all email accounts associated with a user.
      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      Returns:
      list of email account addresses

    • getEmailsFromDb

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<ImapMail> getEmailsFromDb(Long userId, String accountEmail, String folderName, String query, int page, int size)
      Retrieves paginated email metadata from the local database.

      The method supports folder filtering, full-text search and special handling of starred messages.

      Parameters:
      userId - authenticated user identifier
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder
      query - optional search phrase
      page - requested page number
      size - page size
      Returns:
      page containing email metadata records
      Throws:
      SecurityException - if the user does not have access to the specified email account
